upcoming.name: SHADES OF NOTHING
upcoming.description:
1111 dark beings. Born from code.

No soul, no mercy, Free Mint.

upcoming.name: Tiny Turtles
upcoming.description: A collection of 10,000 hand drawn cute turtles on Ethereum

upcoming.name: Puzzle Jigsaw mask
upcoming.description: A collection dedicated to John Kramer, the master of puzzles and riddles. Movie characters combined with a mask from the Saw film. For collectors and beyond. A nod to creative thought. A little suspense never hurt anyone... ;))

upcoming.name: XTremX
upcoming.description:
XtremX — 5555 NFTs.

A dark, high-energy universe built for early ones.

Each piece represents a unique character from a corrupted dimension.

Most will watch. Few will act 👁️

upcoming.name: "Faces" by Michael Hafftka
upcoming.description: *Faces* is a collection of 99 unique 1/1 digital portraits by New York artist Michael Hafftka, spanning over fifty years of his artistic practice. Works range from analog paintings from the 1970s and 80s to recent digital and animated pieces, offered

upcoming.name: Gift of Time by Manuel Larino
upcoming.description:
**Gift of Time** began during my residency in Marfa, Texas, as part of the Art Blocks and OpenSea program, where a shift in the experience of time became central to the work.

In the desert, time moved differently. It stretched, slowed, and became so
